## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run ci` passes locally (or will after CI is wired for new packages)
- [ ] If this changes user-visible behavior or public API of a **published** package: I ran `npm run changeset` and committed the `.changeset/*.md` file
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (`internal-docs/…`)
